recipes.title: Homemade Granola with Almonds, Coconut and Seeds

sections.name: Ingredients
lines: 50 g honey (or mix with a little maple syrup)

sections.name: Steps
lines: In a large bowl, mix oil, honey, and salt until combined.
Add oats, chopped almonds, pumpkin seeds, and shredded coconut.
Stir until everything is lightly coated.
Spread the mixture in an even layer on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20–25 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes to ensure even roasting.
When the granola is golden and fragrant, remove from the oven.
The edges may be slightly darker.
Let the granola cool completely on the tray so it becomes crunchy.
Once cool, mix in cranberries, sesame seeds, and chopped dried mango.

sections.name: Notes
lines: For larger clusters, press the granola flat after the final stir and allow it to cool without disturbing it.
Maple syrup, date syrup, or cinnamon can be used for variation.
Serve with kefir, yogurt, or milk.

stepItems.text: Preheat oven to 160°C.
Roughly chop the almonds.
In a large bowl, mix oil, honey, and salt until combined.
Add oats, chopped almonds, pumpkin seeds, and shredded coconut.
Stir until everything is lightly coated.
Spread the mixture in an even layer on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20–25 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes to ensure even roasting.
When the granola is golden and fragrant, remove from the oven.
The edges may be slightly darker.
Let the granola cool completely on the tray so it becomes crunchy.
Once cool, mix in cranberries, sesame seeds, and chopped dried mango.
Store in an airtight container.

steps: Preheat oven to 160°C.

Let the granola cool completely on the tray so it becomes crunchy.
Once cool, mix in cranberries, sesame seeds, and chopped dried mango.

recipes.title: One-pot Beef Macaroni

sections.name: Steps
lines: 1. Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and sauté until soft and translucent (about 5 minutes).
2. Add ground beef and cook until fully browned. Drain excess fat if needed.
3. Sprinkle flour, chili powder, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and oregano
over the beef and continue stirring for about 2 minutes.
4. Add tomato sauce and beef broth, stirring well and scraping any browned
bits from the bottom of the pan.
5. Stir in uncooked macaroni. Cover and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
6. Once boiling, stir briefly, reduce heat to medium-low, and re-cover.
Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender
7. Stir in half the cheddar cheese until melted. Sprinkle remaining cheese on
top, cover with a lid, and turn off heat.
8. Let sit until cheese melts completely. Serve hot.

stepItems.text: Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion and garlic and sauté until soft and translucent (about 5 minutes).
Add ground beef and cook until fully browned. Drain excess fat if needed.
Sprinkle flour, chili powder, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and oregano over the beef and continue stirring for about 2 minutes.
Add tomato sauce and beef broth, stirring well and scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Stir in uncooked macaroni. Cover and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Once boiling, stir briefly, reduce heat to medium-low, and re-cover. Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender and sauce has thickened.
Stir in half the cheddar cheese until melted. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top, cover with a lid, and turn off heat.
Let sit until cheese melts completely. Serve hot.

Stir in half the cheddar cheese until melted. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top, cover with a lid, and turn off heat.
Let sit until cheese melts completely. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Italian-style Veggie Burgers

sections.name: Burger Patties
lines: - Salt and black pepper to taste

sections.name: Parmesan Dressing
lines: - 2 dl yogurt (oat- or soy-based works well)
- Salt and black pepper to taste

sections.name: Steps
lines: - Add all burger patty ingredients except the panko to a food processor.
- Pulse until you get a coarse mixture (do not overblend).
- Shape into burgers and coat lightly in panko.
- Heat a generous amount of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
- Fry burgers until golden on both sides and heated through.
- Mix all dressing ingredients in a bowl.
- Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
- Fill with burger, parmesan dressing, tomato, and arugula.

stepItems.text: Make the patties
Add all burger patty ingredients except the panko to a food processor.
Pulse until you get a coarse mixture (do not overblend).
Shape into burgers and coat lightly in panko.
Cook the burgers
Heat a generous amount of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Fry burgers until golden on both sides and heated through.
Make the dressing
Mix all dressing ingredients in a bowl.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Assemble
Toast the buns lightly.
Fill with burger, parmesan dressing, tomato, and arugula.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Spiced Rice with Chickpeas and Artichokes

sections.name: Ingredients
lines: - 1 can (400 g) quartered artichoke hearts, drained
- 1 can (400 g) chickpeas, drained and rinsed

sections.name: Steps
lines: 1. Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet over medium-low heat. Add garlic
and cook for 1–2 minutes until soft and fragrant.
2. Add smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, cayenne, and black pepper. Stir and
cook for about 1 minute to bloom the spices.
3. Add onion and cook until soft and translucent (about 5 minutes).
4. Stir in rice and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add chickpeas, artichokes, diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, salt, and most
of the chopped parsley. Stir until well combined.
6. Cover and bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to low and simmer for
20 minutes, keeping a gentle simmer the whole time.
7. Turn off heat and let rest for 5 minutes without removing the lid.
8. Fluff with a fork, sprinkle with remaining parsley, and finish with fresh

stepItems.text: Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet over medium-low heat. Add garlic and cook for 1–2 minutes until soft and fragrant.
Add smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, cayenne, and black pepper. Stir and cook for about 1 minute to bloom the spices.
Add onion and cook until soft and translucent (about 5 minutes).
Stir in rice and cook for 2 minutes.
Add chickpeas, artichokes, diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, salt, and most of the chopped parsley. Stir until well combined.
Cover and bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, keeping a gentle simmer the whole time.
Turn off heat and let rest for 5 minutes without removing the lid.
Fluff with a fork, sprinkle with remaining parsley, and finish with fresh lemon juice before serving.

steps: Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet over medium-low heat. Add garlic and cook for 1–2 minutes until soft and fragrant.
Add smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, cayenne, and black pepper. Stir and cook for about 1 minute to bloom the spices.
Add onion and cook until soft and translucent (about 5 minutes).
Stir in rice and cook for 2 minutes.
Add chickpeas, artichokes, diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, salt, and most of the chopped parsley. Stir until well combined.
Cover and bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, keeping a gentle simmer the whole time.
Turn off heat and let rest for 5 minutes without removing the lid.
Fluff with a fork, sprinkle with remaining parsley, and finish with fresh lemon juice before serving.

recipes.title: Italian Sausages and Peppers Pasta

sections.name: Ingredients
lines: - 400 g spicy sausage (chorizo, kabanoss, or similar)
- 2 cloves garlic (or garlic powder to taste)

sections.name: Steps
lines: 1. Add olive oil and the unsliced sausages to a large pot. Cook over medium heat until browned and firm enough to slice. They do not need to be fully cooked yet.
2. While the sausages cook, thinly slice the bell peppers and onion, and mince the garlic.
3. Remove the browned sausages from the pot. Add the peppers, onion, and garlic, and cook until softened.
4. Slice the sausages into thin medallions and return them to the pot.
5. Add the diced tomatoes, basil, oregano, and red pepper flakes. Stir well and let simmer over medium heat.
6. In a separate pot, bring salted water to a boil and cook the pasta until just tender (slightly undercooked).
7. Drain the pasta and add it to the sauce. Stir, cover, and let cook for about 5 minutes until most liquid is absorbed.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot.

stepItems.text: Add olive oil and the unsliced sausages to a large pot. Cook over medium heat until browned and firm enough to slice. They do not need to be fully cooked yet.

recipes.title: Pasta Casserole

sections.name: Sauce
lines: - 3 cloves garlic (or garlic powder to taste)

sections.name: Steps
lines: - Boil pasta in well-salted water until just al dente.
- Before draining, reserve about 2.5 dl of pasta water.
- Heat olive oil or butter in a pan over medium heat.
- Add bell peppers and garlic and cook until soft and fragrant.
- Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1–2 minutes to remove the raw taste.
- Add crème fraîche and gradually mix in pasta water until creamy.
- Season with salt, pepper, and spices.
- If using spinach, stir it in now and allow it to wilt.
- Add cooked pasta to a baking dish.
- Mix in some of the mozzarella.
- Pour sauce over the pasta and stir gently.
- Top with remaining mozzarella and cheddar.
- Bake for about 8 minutes until cheese is melted, lightly golden,
and sauce bubbles around the edges.
- Let rest for a few minutes before serving.
- Leftovers taste even better the next day.

stepItems.text: Cook the pasta
Boil pasta in well-salted water until just al dente.
Before draining, reserve about 2.5 dl of pasta water.
Drain and set aside.
Make the sauce
Heat olive oil or butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add bell peppers and garlic and cook until soft and fragrant.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1–2 minutes to remove the raw taste.
Add crème fraîche and gradually mix in pasta water until creamy.
Season with salt, pepper, and spices.
If using spinach, stir it in now and allow it to wilt.
Assemble the casserole
Preheat oven to 200°C.
Add cooked pasta to a baking dish.
Mix in some of the mozzarella.
Pour sauce over the pasta and stir gently.
Top with remaining mozzarella and cheddar.
Bake
Bake for about 8 minutes until cheese is melted, lightly golden, and sauce bubbles around the edges.
Serve
Let rest for a few minutes before serving.
Parmesan to taste
Leftovers taste even better the next day.

recipes.title: Stekt torsk med rostad potatis och avokadohollandaise

sections.name: Steps
lines: - Halvera potatis (oskalad) och placera på en plåt med bakplåtspapper. Blanda med en skvätt olivolja, salt och en nypa peppar.
- Rosta i ugnen i 25–35 min, eller tills gyllene och mjuk.
- TIPS: Använd fler plåtar om det blir för trångt.
- Halvera och kärna ur avokado. Gröp ur den med en sked direkt i en bägare.
- Finhacka persilja och lök. Finhacka eller pressa vitlök.
- Blanda vitlök, olivolja, en nypa salt och peppar i en liten skål. Ställ åt sidan.
- Placera haricots verts på en ny plåt med bakplåtspapper när det återstår 15 min av potatisens tillagningstid.
- Blanda med en skvätt olivolja och en nypa salt, sätt in i ugnen och rosta resterande tid.
- Koka upp vatten i en liten kastrull. Tillsätt lök, buljong, en skvätt citrussaft, salt och en nypa peppar. Sänk till medelvärme och sjud i 1–2 min.
- Tillsätt smör, äggula och buljong till bägaren med avokado och blanda med en mixerstav (eller i en stationär mixer) tills slätt. Håll varmt.
- TIPS: Mosa avokadon och tillsätt den i såsen om du inte har en mixer.
- Hetta upp en skvätt olivolja i en stor stekpanna på medelhög värme.
- Torka av fisk med hushållspapper och krydda med salt och Hello Sunrise.
- Stek fisk med skinnsidan ner i 4–5 min. Vänd fisken och stek i ytterligare 3–4 min, eller tills gyllene och genomstekt.
- TIPS: Fisken är klar när fiskköttet är vitt/ogenomskinligt och lätt faller isär.
- Lägg upp fisk, potatis och haricots verts på tallrikar.

stepItems.text: Rosta potatis
Värm ugnen till 240 °C/220 °C (varmluft).
Halvera potatis (oskalad) och placera på en plåt med bakplåtspapper. Blanda med en skvätt olivolja, salt och en nypa peppar.
Rosta i ugnen i 25–35 min, eller tills gyllene och mjuk.
Använd fler plåtar om det blir för trångt.
Förbered grönsaker
Ansa haricots verts.
Halvera citrusfrukt.
Halvera och kärna ur avokado. Gröp ur den med en sked direkt i en bägare.
Finhacka persilja och lök. Finhacka eller pressa vitlök.
Blanda vitlök, olivolja, en nypa salt och peppar i en liten skål. Ställ åt sidan.
Rosta haricots verts
Placera haricots verts på en ny plåt med bakplåtspapper när det återstår 15 min av potatisens tillagningstid.
Blanda med en skvätt olivolja och en nypa salt, sätt in i ugnen och rosta resterande tid.
Laga sås
Koka upp vatten i en liten kastrull. Tillsätt lök, buljong, en skvätt citrussaft, salt och en nypa peppar. Sänk till medelvärme och sjud i 1–2 min.
Separera äggula från äggvita.
Ta av kastrullen från värme.
Tillsätt smör, äggula och buljong till bägaren med avokado och blanda med en mixerstav (eller i en stationär mixer) tills slätt. Håll varmt.
Mosa avokadon och tillsätt den i såsen om du inte har en mixer.
Stek fisk
Hetta upp en skvätt olivolja i en stor stekpanna på medelhög värme.
Torka av fisk med hushållspapper och krydda med salt och Hello Sunrise.
Stek fisk med skinnsidan ner i 4–5 min. Vänd fisken och stek i ytterligare 3–4 min, eller tills gyllene och genomstekt.
Vänd potatis med persilja.
Vänd haricots verts med vitlöksolja.
Fisken är klar när fiskköttet är vitt/ogenomskinligt och lätt faller isär.
Servera
Lägg upp fisk, potatis och haricots verts på tallrikar.
Servera med avokado-hollandaisesås.
